message.content:
@startuml
title Interactions between the Control Plane (master node) and the Worker Node

actor Georgina as Georgina

participant "API-Server" as API-Server
participant "etcd" as etcd
participant "Controller Manager" as Controller Manager
participant "Scheduler" as Scheduler
participant "Power Operator" as Power Operator
participant "Kubelet" as Kubelet
participant "Power Node Agent" as Power Node Agent
participant "Power Optimization Library" as Power Optimization Library
participant "K8s Objects" as K8s Objects
participant "Kube-Proxy" as Kube-Proxy

legend right
Control Plane ~ Master Node
Worker Node
Power Manager System Setup
Power Manager Configuration
Power Manager Deployment
endlegend

rectangle "Kubernetes Initialization" {
  Georgina -> API-Server: 1 kubectl create -f pod.yaml
  API-Server -> etcd: 2 save new state
  etcd --> API-Server: 3 check for changes
  API-Server -> Scheduler: 4 watch for unassigned pods(s)
  Scheduler --> API-Server: 5 notify about pod w nodename=""
  API-Server -> Scheduler: 6 assign pod to node
  Scheduler --> API-Server: 7 save new state
  API-Server -> Scheduler: 8 look for newly assigned pod(s)
  Scheduler --> Kubelet: 9 bind pod to node
  Kubelet --> Power Node Agent: 10 start container
  Power Node Agent --> API-Server: 11 update pod status
  API-Server -> etcd: 12 save new state
}

rectangle "Power Manager Initialization" {
  Georgina -> Kube-Proxy: 1 Ensure correct proxy configuration
  Georgina -> Power Operator: 2 Confirm CPU Manager policy
  Power Operator -> Power Operator: cpuManagerPolicy = "static"
  Georgina -> Power Operator: 3 Reserve System CPUs
  Power Operator -> Power Operator: reservedSystemCPUs = "0"
  Power Operator -> K8s Objects: 4 Create Namespace
  K8s Objects -> Power Operator: apply config/rbac/namespace.yaml
  Power Operator -> K8s Objects: 5 Create RBAC and Service Accounts
  K8s Objects -> Power Operator: apply config/rbac/rbac.yaml
  Power Operator -> K8s Objects: 6 Create CRDs
  K8s Objects -> Power Operator: make
  Power Operator -> Kube-Proxy: 7 Label nodes
  Kube-Proxy -> Power Operator: label node <NODE_NAME> feature.node.kubernetes.io/power-node="true"
}

rectangle "Power Manager Deployment" {
  Georgina -> Power Operator: 1 Deploy Controller Manager
  Power Operator -> Power Operator: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
  Georgina -> Power Operator: 2 Deploy the config
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-pod.yaml
}

rectangle "Power Manager additional functionality" {
  Georgina -> Power Operator: 1 Confirm Kernel version
  Power Operator -> Power Operator: kernel 5.6+ required for uncore
  Georgina -> Power Operator: 2 Set Freq in Die and Pkg
  Power Operator -> Power Operator: 3 Deploy Controller Manager
  Power Operator -> Power Operator: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
  Georgina -> Power Operator: 4 Deploy the config
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-pod.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-timeofday.yaml
}

rectangle "Uncore" {
  Georgina -> Power Operator: 1 Confirm Kernel version
  Power Operator -> Power Operator: kernel 5.6+ required for uncore
  Georgina -> Power Operator: 2 Set Freq in Die and Pkg
  Power Operator -> Power Operator: 3 Deploy Controller Manager
  Power Operator -> Power Operator: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
  Georgina -> Power Operator: 4 Deploy the config
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-pod.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-timeofday.yaml
}

rectangle "P-State" {
  Georgina -> Power Operator: 1 Deploy Controller Manager
  Power Operator -> Power Operator: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
  Georgina -> Power Operator: 2 Deploy the config
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-pod.yaml
}

rectangle "C-State" {
  Georgina -> Power Operator: Deploy Controller Manager
  Power Operator -> Power Operator: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
  Georgina -> Power Operator: Deploy the config
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-pod.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-cstates.yaml
}

rectangle "Time of Day" {
  Georgina -> Power Operator: Deploy Controller Manager
  Power Operator -> Power Operator: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
  Georgina -> Power Operator: Deploy the config
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-pod.yaml
  Power Operator -> Power Optimization Library: examples/example-timeofday.yaml
}

note right of Georgina
  Georgina
endnote

note left of Georgina
  Georgina
endnote

@enduml
